name: web-slides
description: Turn material, outlines, or talking points into click-driven 16:9 HTML slide decks for live presenting — cinematic, anti-AI aesthetic, 24 theme tokens, per-step speaker notes (press N). No narration script, no audio, no video recording. Ships a Vite + React + TypeScript scaffold, a (chapter, step) cursor model, hard collaboration checkpoints, and a theme-token architecture. Good for talks, keynotes, product demos, pitch decks, teaching, and interview project retros.
